mapper.select:
SELECT t.*, t1.real_name create_user_name FROM member t LEFT OUTER JOIN castle_sys_user t1 ON t.create_user = t1.id WHERE t.is_deleted = 2
AND t.id like concat('%',#{memberEntity.id},'%')
AND t.user_name like concat('%',#{memberEntity.userName},'%')
AND t.password like concat('%',#{memberEntity.password},'%')
AND t.phone like concat('%',#{memberEntity.phone},'%')
AND t.nick_name like concat('%',#{memberEntity.nickName},'%')
AND t.openid like concat('%',#{memberEntity.openid},'%')
AND t.unionid like concat('%',#{memberEntity.unionid},'%')
AND t.avatar like concat('%',#{memberEntity.avatar},'%')
AND t.gender like concat('%',#{memberEntity.gender},'%')
AND t.birthday like concat('%',#{memberEntity.birthday},'%')
AND t.status like concat('%',#{memberEntity.status},'%')
AND t.remark like concat('%',#{memberEntity.remark},'%')
AND t.create_user like concat('%',#{memberEntity.createUser},'%')
AND t.create_time >= #{memberEntity.startTime}
AND t.create_time <= #{memberEntity.endTime}
AND t.create_time like concat('%',#{memberEntity.createTime},'%')
AND t.update_user like concat('%',#{memberEntity.updateUser},'%')
AND t.update_time like concat('%',#{memberEntity.updateTime},'%')
AND t.is_deleted like concat('%',#{memberEntity.isDeleted},'%')
order by create_time desc
limit #{map.offset},#{map.rows}

SELECT count(1) FROM member t WHERE t.is_deleted = 2
AND t.id like concat('%',#{memberEntity.id},'%')
AND t.user_name like concat('%',#{memberEntity.userName},'%')
AND t.password like concat('%',#{memberEntity.password},'%')
AND t.phone like concat('%',#{memberEntity.phone},'%')
AND t.nick_name like concat('%',#{memberEntity.nickName},'%')
AND t.openid like concat('%',#{memberEntity.openid},'%')
AND t.unionid like concat('%',#{memberEntity.unionid},'%')
AND t.avatar like concat('%',#{memberEntity.avatar},'%')
AND t.gender like concat('%',#{memberEntity.gender},'%')
AND t.birthday like concat('%',#{memberEntity.birthday},'%')
AND t.status like concat('%',#{memberEntity.status},'%')
AND t.remark like concat('%',#{memberEntity.remark},'%')
AND t.create_user like concat('%',#{memberEntity.createUser},'%')
AND t.create_time >= #{memberEntity.startTime}
AND t.create_time <= #{memberEntity.endTime}
AND t.create_time like concat('%',#{memberEntity.createTime},'%')
AND t.update_user like concat('%',#{memberEntity.updateUser},'%')
AND t.update_time like concat('%',#{memberEntity.updateTime},'%')
AND t.is_deleted like concat('%',#{memberEntity.isDeleted},'%')
SELECT t.*, t1.real_name create_user_name FROM member t LEFT OUTER JOIN castle_sys_user t1 ON t.create_user = t1.id WHERE t.is_deleted = 2 AND t.id = #{id}
